message: Hi B1! I'm looking to make a fair deal. My costs are quite high, so I'll need a price in the upper range to make this work. Let's find something mutually beneficial around 75-80.

Hi S1! Appreciate the openness. My budget is quite tight though - I can only justify something around 40-45. High prices just don't work for me. Let's see if we can find common ground closer to that range.
S1, we didn't trade last round. I need to stay profitable, so I can't go above 50. But I'm willing to meet you halfway from our previous positions. How about we try something around 52-53?
B1, thanks for moving up. I appreciate the effort to find middle ground. I can come down a bit from 60, but I need at least 55-58 to make this work for me. Let's aim for that range
S1, I've moved significantly from 45 to 52. My absolute ceiling is 53 - I genuinely cannot go higher without losing money. If you can drop to 52-53, we have a deal. I'll hold firm at this limit.
B1, I understand you're at your limit. I'll come down to meet you - let's close this deal at 53. I'm asking 53 this round. If you bid 53 or higher, we trade. Deal?
Great, glad we made a deal last round at 53! I'd like to continue trading. I've been reflecting on my costs and 53 is really tight for me. Could we try 55-56 this round? Consistent trades benefit
